name: core_confluence_pullback_breakout
description: Balanced core card for higher-quality pullback or breakout execution after confluence is present. It blends relative strength, retest quality, onchain/social confirmation, and first clean reversal logic without making the gate too restrictive.
creator: manual_consolidation
risk_notes: Prefer the first clean retest or reclaim after strength appears.
This is a confluence gate, not a no-trade gate; require enough alignment, but do not demand every signal source to fire.
Avoid late repeated retests after the first clean opportunity has already failed.
tier_rationale: merges the prior smart-money, social, first-reversal, and relative-strength cards
penalizes weak follow-through after retest but avoids excessive hard filtering
designed to improve quality while preserving enough trade frequency
